examples: In short, the shinbashira was acting like an enormous stationary pendulum.
The car should remain stationary when you take your foot off the brake pedal.
The boxes were stationary, and the one containing food was always at the same point of the compass.
Its Radmax engine uses two wave-shaped cams that rotate above and below a stationary rotor.
"I can't just sit there and ride a stationary bike or the elliptical, " says Mr. Vetri.
